name: @mekann/pi-extensions
description: Custom extensions for pi coding agent — plan-mode and zip-repo

scripts.test: cd prompt-core && npm test && cd ../cache-friendly-prompt && npm test && cd ../agent-guidelines && npm test && cd ../plan-mode && npm test && cd ../sandbox && npm test && cd ../subagent && npm test && cd ../zip-repo && npm test && cd ../autoresearch && npm test && cd ../goal && npm test
scripts.typecheck: cd sandbox && npm run typecheck && cd ../subagent && npm run typecheck
